verdictReason: Backend xAPI unreachable — storefront cannot render any data-backed page. Smoke suite not executable.

backendHealth.storefrontRender: BLANK — no DOM content; accessibility snapshot empty on / and /catalog after fresh reload + 6-8s wait
backendHealth.apolloClient: ApolloError: signal timed out at 120106ms (vendor-aUHQp9xl.js) — initial xAPI query never returns
backendHealth.directHealthProbe: GET https://vcst-qa.govirto.com/health => http=000, timed out at 30s
backendHealth.directGraphqlProbe: POST https://vcst-qa.govirto.com/graphql {__typename} => http=000, timed out at 60s

checklistRollup.SMOKE-CROSS-LAYER-CHECKLIST: 0/25 (all BLOCKED — UI-vs-backend parity unverifiable while backend is down)

testCases.notes: Environment unreachable — storefront renders blank shell; all xAPI /graphql queries time out (ApolloError: signal timed out @120s). Backend /health and /graphql return http=000 (timeout) on direct probe. Not executable.

bugs.title: vcst-qa backend xAPI unreachable — storefront renders blank shell, all /graphql queries time out
bugs.failedAssertion: [NETWORK] no failed GraphQL requests on homepage render
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Navigate to https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com/ on playwright-chrome. 2. Wait 6s, re-snapshot. 3. Observe blank page (empty accessibility tree, white screenshot). 4. Check console: ApolloError: signal timed out @120106ms. 5. Check network: POST /graphql => net::ERR_ABORTED. 6. Probe backend directly: curl -sk https://vcst-qa.govirto.com/health => http=000 (30s timeout); curl -sk -X POST .../graphql {__typename} => http=000 (60s timeout).
bugs.expected: Storefront homepage and /catalog render with hero, categories, product cards + prices; xAPI /graphql returns 200; /health returns 200.
bugs.actual: Storefront SPA shell loads (HTML 200, title set) but no content renders on any page; every xAPI query hangs until the 120s Apollo client timeout; backend /health and /graphql both unresponsive (http=000) on direct probe.

errors: environment_unreachable: backend xAPI (vcst-qa.govirto.com) not responding — storefront blank shell; suite halted at pre-flight per runner protocol
